gap_statement: Current coverage appears to underrepresent Chinese-language or Chinese-context studies.
counter_evidence: Multiple papers study Chinese contexts: Xi'an (2003, 2006), Dalian (2016), Kunming (2013), Hefei (2016), Shanghai (2020), Hong Kong (2020)
8 out of 11 papers collect data in Chinese cities
However, all publications are in English - no Chinese-language publications are present

gap_statement: There are unresolved claim differences across papers under the same task, suggesting a need for clearer comparison criteria.
counter_evidence: Papers nominally under the same task (e.g., 'red light running') use different methodologies: simulation (Yang 2006), SEM (Zhou 2016), random parameter logit (Chen 2020), binary logistic regression (Zhang 2016), mixture distribution modeling (Yang 2013)

Different task granularities: 'pedestrian_red_light_running_simulation' vs 'predicting_pedestrian_violating_behavior_intention' vs 'examine_effects_of_personal_factors_on_red_light_running' are distinct research foci
The 32 contradictions may reflect legitimate methodological variation rather than conflicting findings on identical hypotheses
